FileName: FY 2026 DHS FLETC PCI Spend Plan

EstimatedObligations.Name: Procurement, construction, improvements, and related expenses to facilities.
EstimatedObligations.Comments: Not more than $465,000,000 of the amounts available under subsection (a) shall be for procurement, construction and maintenance of, improvements to, training equipment for, and related expenses, of facilities of the Federal Law Enforcement Training Centers.
